Please let us know when payment is complete.

Thank you.

message.Text:
1. Sure I can make march a full month.
2. denare will lend you 24k, payable 2k a month over the next year.
3. will you be cashflow positive each month? If not it's just going to be ballooning and it's never ending. If you have other debts, I suggest you (after some track record), take out a bank loan to pay things off lump sum and slowly pay back the loans, maintaining monthly positive cash flow

baselineCommitments.owes_what: Make March a full month commitment
